summary: Backend testing for Execution Budget Freeze + Actual Progress Input (Phases 1-6). All 20 tests PASSED. Endpoints verified with real data including budget freeze creation/listing, progress updates with validation, history with user names, progress vs cost comparison with gap calculation, warnings, risk flags, and project progress summary with weighted progress.
seed_data_creation: Created test progress updates (55.5%, 0%, 100%) and budget freezes (v5, v6, v7) during tests. Used existing project c3529276-8c03-49b3-92de-51216aab25da (PRJ-001) and execution package 0e937841...
context_for_next_testing_agent: Budget progress routes fully tested. Key findings: (1) P1: 7 budget freezes now exist (v1-v7), version auto-increments correctly, package snapshots include all fields; (2) P2: progress validation 0-100 works, rejects -5% and 105%, updates execution_packages.progress_percent; (3) P3: history endpoint returns 7 entries with user names (System Admin); (4) P4: comparison shows progress 100% vs labor 16.2% vs material 0% vs subcontract 50%, gaps calculated correctly (labor gap=-83.8%); (5) P5: 1 warning (missing_progress_updates for 2/3 packages), risk=medium with insufficient_progress_data flag; (6) P6: weighted progress=56.8%, total_sale=4400 EUR, budget_freeze v7 included

P1: POST /api/budget-freezes/{project_id.note: Creates versioned freeze with package snapshots, totals calculated

P1: GET /api/budget-freezes/{project_id}.note: Lists 7 freezes sorted by version desc

values.note: gap = usage - progress, negative = cost behind progress

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints using real backend
